Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

DBMS

Snowflake


Check constraint name of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIAN


Server validation rule of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

%RULES%


Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3 (
RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY TEXT_255_ not null,
MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY TEXT_255_,
COUNTRY_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_REFERENCE_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_REFERENCE_EAN_CODE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VARIANT_REFERENCE_TYPE_BK TEXT_255_ not null,
VALID_FROM DATETIME not null,
VALID_TO DATETIME not null,
ACTIVE_FLAG BOOLEAN not null,
constraint PK_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT primary key (RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY)
not enforced
);

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY is
'PK for RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY is
'FK to MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.COUNTRY_CODE_BK is
'Country where the product is available (events_country_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK is
'Code of the variant product (events_products_variants_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.VARIANT_REFERENCE_CODE_BK is
'Variant Reference Code (events_products_variants_references_code )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.VARIANT_REFERENCE_EAN_CODE_BK is
'Variant Reference EAN Code (events_products_variants_references_eanCode )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.VARIANT_REFERENCE_TYPE_BK is
'Variant Reference Type (events_products_variants_references_type )';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.VALID_FROM is
'Hardcoded value ''1900-01-01''';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.VALID_TO is
'Hardcoded value ''9999-12-31''';

comment on column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3.ACTIVE_FLAG is
'Hardcoded value ''Y''';

Column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

Card of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

MD5 Based Composite Hash Key Comprising of

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_REFERENCES_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_REFERENCES_EANCODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_REFERENCES_TYPE


Check constraint name of the column RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

CKC_RDE_PRODUCT_CATAL_RDE_PROD

Column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

Card of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

Name

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY

Code

MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY

Data Type

TEXT

Mandatory

No


Description of the column MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

LEFT JOIN T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG pc

ON EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pc.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE = pc.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE

Detailed logic in attached query

Column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

Card of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

Name

VALID_TO

Code

VALID_TO

Data Type

DATE

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column VALID_TO of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

VALID_TO: Indicates the dattime till when the record is/was valid. In case record is still valid it should contain date 9999-12-31

Name

ACTIVE_FLAG

Code

ACTIVE_FLAG

Data Type

<Undefined>

Mandatory

Yes


Description of the column ACTIVE_FLAG of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_REFERENCE3

ACTIVE_FLAG: Active Indicator. True value only for only the most recent record. All others being updated as False.
